description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named C/C++ CI that runs on every push to the dev branch, on pull requests to dev, and on pull request targets to dev. Use a matrix job on ubuntu-latest that compiles and tests with different C/C++ compilers (clang-9, gcc-9) and Python version 3.7, with both debug and release configurations. The job checks out the repository, installs system and Python dependencies, runs linters and tests, and shows failure logs if any.
